description: The SAP S/4HANA Sales connector provides APIs that enable seamless integration with the [Sales Area - Read (A2X) v1.0.0](https://api.sap.com/api/SALESAREA_0001/overview). The service allows users to read sales areas.
key-features: Read sales area master data from SAP S/4HANA
Seamless integration with the Sales Area - Read (A2X) API v1.0.0
Support for basic and OAuth 2.0 authentication
Operations for querying sales area data
